title: pilosella glomerabilis
intro: Pilosella glomerabilis, also known as Hooded Ragwort or Glomerate Hawkweed, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pilosella glomerabilis include treating conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Pilosella glomerabilis can be made into infusions, tinctures, or salves, and are often used to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and promote healing.
